description_long: This bungalow features a modern, low-profile design with a flat roof and clean, horizontal lines. The front facade is defined by a central entrance with a covered portico, flanked by large rectangular windows and accentuated by light-colored cladding and wooden shutters. The structure is surrounded by a fenced yard with a well-maintained grassy area, providing privacy and outdoor space. The rear and side elevations show a continuation of the horizontal siding, with additional large windows and a secondary entrance visible. The roof includes two recessed green spaces, adding a touch of nature to the otherwise minimalist architecture. The overall appearance is sleek and contemporary, with an emphasis on simplicity and functional outdoor integration.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a fenced grassy yard, featuring minimalist lines and a central entrance portico.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main entrance with a covered portico, large windows with wooden shutters, and the symmetrical facade.
description_view_1: The left side view shows the fenced grassy yard, a secondary entrance, and additional windows, emphasizing the private outdoor space.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the horizontal siding, two recessed green roof sections, and the full extent of the fenced yard.
description_view_3: The right side view reveals a large window and the continuation of the flat roof, with the yard and fence extending along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with additional side and rear windows
